text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing 8 of 9 SC; claiming conformance without coverage.

list.item: sc_results missing any of the 9 new SC.
findings list non-empty without per-finding page + issue.
